nodes.label: Linux Core
nodes.desc: Master CLI navigation, text parsing, file permissions, and environment variables.

nodes.label: CLI Scripting
nodes.desc: Write bash automation scripts, pipes, filters, and command chaining.

nodes.label: Permissions & Sudo
nodes.desc: Configure sudoers, group boundaries, and standard file ownership.

nodes.label: SSH & Port Forwarding
nodes.desc: Configure SSH servers, key file authenticators, and local/remote tunnel forwards.

nodes.label: UFW Firewalls
nodes.desc: Set up iptables wrappers, block IPs, and enforce network isolation.

nodes.label: fail2ban Intrusion Defense
nodes.desc: Configure log jail filters, automated IP bans, and ssh brute-forcing prevention.

nodes.label: Docker Containers
nodes.desc: Run isolated namespaces, mount volume paths, and compile custom Dockerfiles.

nodes.label: Docker Compose Stack
nodes.desc: Orchestrate multi-tier services, depends_on order, and internal virtual networks.

nodes.label: gVisor & eBPF Security
nodes.desc: Isolate container syscall kernels and trace sandbox buffers via eBPF probes.

nodes.label: systemd Services
nodes.desc: Create systemd units, startup loops, journalctl troubleshooting, and limits.

nodes.label: Nginx Web Server
nodes.desc: Deploy static web directories, server blocks, custom ports, and headers.

nodes.label: Reverse Proxy & Upstreams
nodes.desc: Proxy WS connections, handle upstream load balancers, and configure SSL (Certbot).

nodes.label: PostgreSQL Server
nodes.desc: Configure database queries, pg_hba credentials, logical dumps, and replication slots.

nodes.label: Redis Cache & Cluster
nodes.desc: Set up key eviction profiles, Sentinel failovers, and persistence snapshots.

nodes.label: Vanilla Java Server
nodes.desc: Launch server.jar, allocate RAM, update properties, whitelist, and write launch scripts.

nodes.label: Bedrock Server Edition
nodes.desc: Run C++ bedrock servers, named pipes commands control, and back up worlds.

nodes.label: Spigot/Paper Plugins
nodes.desc: Optimize Paper configs, handle LuckPerms nodes, and install plugin integrations.

nodes.label: BungeeCord Waterfall Proxy
nodes.desc: Link server mode tunnels, block backend direct scans, and balance player lobbies.

nodes.label: Forge/Fabric Modded Server
nodes.desc: Allocate modpack JVM resources, fix entity tick crashes, and manage registries.

nodes.label: Performance logs & htop
nodes.desc: Track process resource leaks, use iotop, tcpdump, and strace diagnostic systems.

nodes.label: CI/CD automated deployments
nodes.desc: Automate server backups, write zero-downtime scripts, and configure git hooks.
